name: AURA SYSTEMS INC
summary: Aura Systems, Inc. is a Delaware corporation founded in 1987 that innovated and commercialized Axial Flux Induction electric motor and generator technology (AAFIM). The company's motors use no permanent magnets or rare earth elements, only copper and steel, offering high efficiency and compact design. Aura has shipped over 11,000 axial flux induction systems in the 5-15 kW range for mobile power generation to military and commercial customers, including deployments in the Balkans, Iraq, and Afghanistan.
